'''Salis D'aar Penitentiary''' was a prison in [[Salis D'aar/Legends|Salis D'aar]], [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. [[Malinza Thanas]] was once held in its [[Cell 12-17]]. It also contained [[Rear Entrance 23]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
